{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Miram
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[House of Blades (novel)|House of Blades]]
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Miram]] uses a small silver key to summon a spinning silver disc.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4">''House of Blades'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Miram]] is someone who tells [[Alin]] that the [[Grandmasters]] have forbidden something.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16">''House of Blades'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Miram shook her head sadly. “Forgive me, Eliadel. The Grandmasters have forbidden it.”<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
